commands.command: live source check for CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+ official/objective pages

[AC-1] Confirmed shipped app tracks and exam codes in src/content/certifications.json: A+ 220-1201/220-1202, Network+ N10-009, Security+ SY0-701.
[AC-5] Strict objective coverage validation passed after adding the drift-watch release gate.
[AC-5] Governance validation still fails on the repo-wide preflight-marker requirement affecting existing work items.

environment.process_note: Objective drift watch process and ledger created for A+ V15, Network+ N10-009, and Security+ SY0-701; Security+ V8 recorded as draft-watch only.
